subcodes.first_line: Blessed is the soul who, through the waters of detachment, cleanseth itself from the dust of desire and passion, and turneth toward the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی از برای نفسیکه از ماء انقطاع خود را از غبار حرص و هوی طاهر کند و قصد افق اعلی نماید
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for unity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @unity; oneness of humanity
